title: Evo Pekka Control Deck Guide | Clash Royale
description: A full ladder guide for the Evo Pekka control deck: matchups, defensive placements, and the counter-push that closes games.
thumbnail_prompt: Evo Pekka mid-charge in the arena, lightning accents, bold 'CONTROL' text, red and gold, shocked opponent face
long_script:
Today I'll show you the strongest Evo Pekka deck in the current meta. It punishes greedy pushes and grinds out value every single cycle.

First, let's look at why this deck is dominating the ladder. The Evo Pekka soaks pressure on defense, then flips into a terrifying counter-push the moment your opponent overcommits.

Now watch this replay carefully, because the timing matters. Notice how I hold the Pekka until the tank crosses the river. Place it a beat too early and you leak elixir; a beat too late and the tower takes damage.

Finally, close the game with the counter-push. Support the Pekka with a mini-tank in front and ranged damage behind, and the three-crown finishes itself.
